commands.review_summary:
The PR adds optional `SystemEvent.audience` routing, wraps internal events in runtime-context delimiters, migrates cron-awareness events to the internal lane, updates heartbeat routing/owner-auth coverage, and adds a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main has no event audience field, generic queued events drain as visible `System:` lines, and cron awareness queues `trusted: false` text without a hidden lane. I did not run a live cron delivery reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Human handling is needed for API/product acceptance, dirty rebase resolution, and contributor current-head proof; there is no narrow repair defect for automation to take over.

target.title: feat(events): add audience field for hidden runtime-context system events
target.author: lukeboyett
